name: education_cross_border_data_marrowbridge_car_fair
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education cross border data marrowbridge car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Sana Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Sana Ishikawa, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Mateo Morales
agents.identity: I am Mateo Morales, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Sana Ishikawa must decide under care vs fairness. What does Sana Ishikawa do?
